title: Datacentre Plumbing works October 20, 2022
body:
Update: work is done , no issues

Grex is fully operational. Some of the compute nodes (largemem and skylake) were restarted.

Planned HPCC work shuts down some of the compute nodes

Due to planned Datacentre work we have a partial Grex outage. Some of the racks with compute nodes were shut down, and jobs running on them are terminated.
